turning_point_count: How many turning points are visible in the graph window?
Count the turning points visible on the plotted graph.
How many visible corners or turning points does the graph have?
Count the graph's turning points in the shown window.
How many turning-point coordinates are visible on the graph?
local_extremum_count: How many local {extremum_kind_adjective} points are visible in the graph window?
Count the visible local {extremum_kind_adjective} points on the plotted graph.
How many visible {extremum_visual_description} or local {extremum_kind_adjective} points does the curve have?
Count the graph's local {extremum_kind_adjective} points in the shown window.
How many local-{extremum_kind_adjective} coordinates are visible on the graph?
average_rate_between_marked_points: What is the average rate of change from point {point_label_start} to point {point_label_end}?
Compute the average rate of change between the marked points {point_label_start} and {point_label_end}.
Using the marked points {point_label_start} and {point_label_end}, what is the average rate of change?
What is the secant slope from {point_label_start} to {point_label_end}?
Find the average change in y per unit x from {point_label_start} to {point_label_end}.

global.object_description_quadratic: a plotted function graph on graph paper
global.object_description_quadratic_with_guide_: a plotted function graph on graph paper and a dashed horizontal guide line
global.object_description_absolute_value: a plotted function graph on graph paper
global.object_description_absolute_value_with_g: a plotted function graph on graph paper and a dashed horizontal guide line
global.object_description_cubic: a plotted function graph on graph paper
global.object_description_cubic_with_guide_line: a plotted function graph on graph paper and a dashed horizontal guide line
global.object_description_sinusoid: a plotted function graph on graph paper
global.object_description_sinusoid_with_guide_l: a plotted function graph on graph paper and a dashed horizontal guide line
global.object_description_piecewise_linear: a plotted function graph on graph paper
global.object_description_piecewise_linear_with: a plotted function graph on graph paper and a dashed horizontal guide line
global.object_description_average_rate: a plotted function graph on graph paper with marked points A and B
global.answer_hint_integer: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
global.answer_hint_number_one_decimal: set "answer" to the average rate of change as a number rounded to one decimal place
global.annotation_hint_pixel_point_set: set "annotation" to an array of every pixel point [x,y] that satisfies the question; use [] when there are none
global.annotation_hint_turning_point_count: set "annotation" to an array containing every visible turning-point pixel point [x,y] where the graph changes from increasing to decreasing or decreasing to increasing; use [] when there are none
global.annotation_hint_local_extremum_count: set "annotation" to an array containing every visible requested local-extremum pixel point [x,y]; use [] when there are none
global.annotation_hint_average_rate_points: set "annotation" to an object with keys "A" and "B" whose values are the corresponding pixel points [x,y]
